summary: A sweet‑sounding tape of an ’84 show that captures stellar second‑set jamming, highlighted by a fiery “I Want to Make Love to You” and a wild segue into “Caution”.
review: All three reviewers rave about the recording’s crystal‑clear, “sweet” sound quality, calling it a great taper. The performance is praised for its deep, dosed second set with standout jams on “I Want to Make Love to You” that flow into an intense “Caution” section, making this ’84 show a must‑listen.

ai_rating.rationale: Uniform 5‑star reviews emphasizing excellent sound and strong second‑set jams; both musical performance and recording quality are described in superlative terms.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the tape as “sweet” and a “great taper,” indicating clear, well‑balanced audio with no noted flaws.

standout_songs: I Want to Make Love to You
show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is highlighted as low‑key, deeply “dosed” and jam‑heavy, with seamless transitions that keep the momentum high.
